intent.primary_intent: get a second beach-appropriate work outfit visual

context.occasion: beach-friendly front-desk work and supplier-visit day
context.climate: hot sunny beach day with strong sun exposure and light breeze

analysis.why_this_works_now: The user asked for a second version of the same beach-friendly work outfit. The best response is a close visual with the same structure but different muted palette and texture: cream VTO with soft navy jacket, olive cotton trousers, and tan leather sandals. This keeps the functional logic identical while giving a new color story and keeping the styling range within his comfort zone.
analysis.persona_alignment: The recommendation stays fully aligned with his persona: understated, practical, host-appropriate, and oriented toward warm-weather day-to-evening use. It avoids anything sharp, anything with visual conflict, and anything that would feel out of place in riad work or family hospitality.
analysis.profile_alignment: The outfit matches his body and wardrobe logic: longer top layer open over a VTO, straight higher-waist trousers with room through seat and thigh, soft jacket rather than a crisp blazer, and leather sandals with a supportive sole. All pieces are in his proven comfort range and in the color and fabric space he has already approved.
analysis.prompt_alignment: The response follows the strict style recommendation format and uses only the last user message as the immediate request context. It does not add new intents, does not mention brands, does not give shopping links, and does not deviate from the described visual.

recommendations.label: Second beach-friendly work visual
recommendations.logic_summary: A calm muted version of the first beach work outfit: cream VTO, soft navy jacket, olive cotton trousers, and tan leather sandals. Same structure, same comfort logic, different color depth.

pieces.styling_note: Wear open over the VTO to keep the line relaxed and avoid visual strain at the chest.
A slightly longer VTO than the first one keeps the proportion balanced and easy to pair with the navy jacket.
Keep the hem clean and not too short so the outfit still reads polished for front desk and supplier visits.
Use the same supportive sandal as in the first visual to keep the practical day-to-evening role clear.

scene.occasion: workday at a beach-friendly office and supplier-visit day
scene.setting: a calm beachside commercial office in Goa with a view of the sea and palm trees, light breeze, and a relaxed supplier-visit environment
scene.lighting: soft natural beachside daylight with gentle shadows and a clean airy aesthetic

pieces.description: cream VTO with a slightly longer body, open neckline, and soft drape
soft navy V-neck jacket worn open over the VTO
muted olive cotton trousers with a roomier rise and clean hem
tan supportive leather sandals with a stable sole

prompt.system: You are a Gemini Flash prompt generator for a virtual try-on task. Render the user in the requested outfit with photographic realism, accurate body proportions, true-to-life fabric behavior, and a believable beachwork context. Keep the style calm, practical, and understated. Avoid editorial exaggeration, fantasy styling, or any visual cues that would make the image look staged or unrealistic. Use the outfit and context exactly as described, and do not add extra accessories, jewelry, or different clothing.
prompt.user: Show me a second beach-appropriate work outfit visual. The user wants a calm muted version of their first beach work outfit: a cream VTO, soft navy jacket, olive cotton trousers, and tan leather sandals. Keep the proportions relaxed, the neckline open, the layers soft, and the overall look practical for front desk and supplier visits by the beach. Use the attached headshot as the visual reference for face and upper body shape. Place the person in a beach-friendly office setting in Goa with a sea view and palm trees, daytime natural light, and a relaxed supplier-visit mood. The image should feel candid, useful, and photo-realistic, as if taken by a professional lifestyle photographer on a supplier visit day.
